title: Undertake care and maintenance of medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake care and maintenance of medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for care and maintenance of medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Confirm maintenance plan and monitoring schedules with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm maintenance plan and monitoring schedules with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm maintenance plan and monitoring schedules with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures.

pcs.text: Prepare self and required approved tools, equipment and materials, including personal protective equipment, according to hygiene and sanitation and health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare self and required approved tools, equipment and materials, including personal protective equipment, according to hygiene and sanitation and health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare self and required approved tools, equipment and materials, including personal protective equipment, according to hygiene and sanitation and health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Check cultivation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check cultivation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check cultivation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for care and maintenance of medicinal cannabis

elements.title: Maintain medicinal cannabis plants

pcs.text: Check and record quantity and weight of plants to be maintained, including mother plants, against specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and record quantity and weight of plants to be maintained, including mother plants, against specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and record quantity and weight of plants to be maintained, including mother plants, against specifications.

pcs.text: Check plant growth to determine maintenance needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check plant growth to determine maintenance needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check plant growth to determine maintenance needs.

pcs.text: Trim and shape plants to allow airflow, and set up framework for flowering
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Trim and shape plants to allow airflow, and set up framework for flowering?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Trim and shape plants to allow airflow, and set up framework for flowering.

pcs.text: Use trimming and shaping techniques to preserve mother plants in the vegetative stage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use trimming and shaping techniques to preserve mother plants in the vegetative stage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use trimming and shaping techniques to preserve mother plants in the vegetative stage.

pcs.text: Secure and train plants onto support structures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Secure and train plants onto support structures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Secure and train plants onto support structures.

pcs.text: Use tools and equipment safely and cautiously around cultivation environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use tools and equipment safely and cautiously around cultivation environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use tools and equipment safely and cautiously around cultivation environment.

pcs.text: Repot and transfer pots between vegetative and flowering areas using safe practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repot and transfer pots between vegetative and flowering areas using safe practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repot and transfer pots between vegetative and flowering areas using safe practices.

pcs.text: Check water and nutrient requirements after pruning and potting, and adjust manually or use control systems to maintain to required levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check water and nutrient requirements after pruning and potting, and adjust manually or use control systems to maintain to required levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check water and nutrient requirements after pruning and potting, and adjust manually or use control systems to maintain to required levels.

pcs.text: Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights.
